pkgmetadata.longdescription: WPS Office is an office productivity suite by Kingsoft. This package provides the WPS 365 edition (the ".365" upstream build), which bundles the cloud, AI and collaboration add-ons and is the only edition upstream ships for arm64 and loong. It conflicts with app-office/wps-office, the amd64-only Personal edition, as both use the same install paths.
